title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 393.090 - Corporation not authorized to enter or appropriate certain buildings
text:
393.090.  Corporation not authorized to enter or appropriate certain buildings. — No corporation, company or individual shall be authorized to enter or appropriate any dwelling, barn, store, warehouse or similar building erected for any agricultural, commercial or manufacturing purposes.
(RSMo 1939 § 5378, A.L. 1943 p. 410 § 162) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 4971; 1919 § 10181; 1909 § 3375
